checks.label: System CA Certificate Count (/system/etc/security/cacerts/)
checks.description: Count of system CA certificates at /system/etc/security/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate List (/system/etc/security/cacerts/)
checks.description: List of system CA certificate hashes at /system/etc/security/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate Count (/system/etc/security/cacerts_google/)
checks.description: Count of system CA certificates at /system/etc/security/cacerts_google/

checks.label: System CA Certificate List (/system/etc/security/cacerts_google/)
checks.description: List of system CA certificate hashes at /system/etc/security/cacerts_google/

checks.label: System CA Certificate Count (/apex/com.android.conscrypt/cacerts/)
checks.description: Count of system CA certificates at /apex/com.android.conscrypt/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate List (/apex/com.android.conscrypt/cacerts/)
checks.description: List of system CA certificate hashes at /apex/com.android.conscrypt/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate Count (/apex/com.android.conscrypt/etc/security/cacerts/)
checks.description: Count of system CA certificates at /apex/com.android.conscrypt/etc/security/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate List (/apex/com.android.conscrypt/etc/security/cacerts/)
checks.description: List of system CA certificate hashes at /apex/com.android.conscrypt/etc/security/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate Count (/vendor/etc/security/cacerts/)
checks.description: Count of system CA certificates at /vendor/etc/security/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate List (/vendor/etc/security/cacerts/)
checks.description: List of system CA certificate hashes at /vendor/etc/security/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate Count (/product/etc/security/cacerts/)
checks.description: Count of system CA certificates at /product/etc/security/cacerts/

checks.label: System CA Certificate List (/product/etc/security/cacerts/)
checks.description: List of system CA certificate hashes at /product/etc/security/cacerts/

checks.label: User-Installed Certificate Count (user 0)
checks.description: User-installed CA certificates for primary user (should be 0)

checks.label: User-Installed Certificate List (user 0)
checks.description: List of user-installed CA certificates for primary user (should be empty)

checks.label: User-Installed Certificate Count (all users)
checks.description: Total user-installed CA certificates across all users (should be 0)

checks.label: User-Installed Certificate List (all users)
checks.description: List user-installed CA certificates across all users (should be empty)

checks.label: Legacy User-Installed Certificate Count (/data/misc/keychain/cacerts-added/)
checks.description: Legacy path for user-installed CAs (older Android) — should be 0

checks.label: Legacy User-Installed Certificate List (/data/misc/keychain/cacerts-added/)
checks.description: Legacy path listing for user-installed CAs (older Android) — should be empty

checks.label: Certificate Pinning Bypass Apps
checks.description: Apps known to bypass SSL/TLS certificate pinning — none should be installed

checks.label: Network Security Config Files (sample)
checks.description: Apps containing custom network security configs (sample up to 5 paths)

checks.label: Hardware Keystore Type
checks.description: Hardware keystore implementation in use

checks.label: Keystore Credentials Count (user 0)
checks.description: Number of credential entries in keystore for primary user

checks.label: Keystore Credentials Count (all users)
checks.command: find /data/misc/keystore -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'user_*' -exec sh -c 'ls {}/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l' \; 2>/dev/null | awk '{s+=$1} END {print s+0}'
checks.description: Aggregate credential entries across all user keystores

checks.label: VPN Lockdown Mode
checks.description: VPN lockdown mode must be enabled for strict network security (1 means enabled)

checks.label: Conscrypt TLS Provider Installed
checks.description: Confirms presence of Google Conscrypt TLS provider

checks.label: HTTP Proxy Configured
checks.description: Reports if an HTTP proxy is configured, which may intercept traffic

checks.label: Global Proxy Host
checks.description: Shows global HTTP proxy host configuration
